comment.body:
Both US and EU markets are pricing out a deflationary spiral. US wants to transfer this to China (it will likely to see stimulus in the near-term). 
Trump's policy is shifting growth away from excessive government spending toward the private sector. Vol remains high. This isn’t favorable for long-term directional bets.
Pain is about to come.
As explained post-OpEx in monday chat: this is just the aviso. Trump is about to trigger real pain and real wealth-effect, before "Fed put" and growth.
Different quant desks also start to see it now.
Keep that in mind.
